---
title: "Salary Survey Data Cleaning Pipeline Report"
author: "Shoaib"
date: "April 2026"
format: docx
---

# Overview

This report is generated automatically by the pipeline.
It documents the full data cleaning and imputation process
applied to the Ask A Manager Salary Survey 2021 dataset.

# Dataset Overview

Source: Ask A Manager Salary Survey 2021
Raw size: 28,215 rows x 18 columns
Download date: April 2026

# Data Quality Diagnostics

To be completed in Week 2.

# Cleaning Decisions

To be completed in Week 2.

# Imputation Applied

To be completed in Week 3.

# Post Cleaning Summary

To be completed in Week 3.

# Limitations and Known Risks

To be completed in Week 3.
